render: 古风摄影+柔光滤镜+花瓣特效,hanfu photography
lighting: 自然光+逆光+金色光晕,golden hour
prompt_keywords: Hanfu photography, traditional Chinese clothing, soft natural lighting, golden hour glow, floral elements, elegant classical aesthetic, shallow depth of field, romantic atmosphere
negative_keywords: modern city, cyberpunk, sci-fi, western architecture, neon, ancient mansion horror, dark ink wash, ukiyo-e

fp_examples.action: 书生背着书箱走在古道,柳枝轻摇
书生与佳人在桃花林相遇,花瓣纷飞
书生在书院奋笔疾书,烛光摇曳
书生与佳人泛舟湖上,远山如黛

prompt_example: A scholar in flowing hanfu stands beneath blooming peach branches at dawn, soft pink petals drifting across the traditional garden path, the scholar holding a bamboo scroll with serene expression, shot in a medium shot from eye level with rule of thirds composition, elegant Chinese classical photography style with soft natural light --ar 2:3 --s 750 --style raw --no text
style_constraint_cn:
【风格强制约束】当前风格: 古风汉服·国风摄影
✅ 允许场景: 古道/桃花林/水乡/庭院/古建筑 (从故事原文提取)
❌ 禁止场景: 现代都市/科幻/西方建筑/赛博朋克
❌ 禁止照抄: 不要用'雨夜古宅',必须用古风唯美场景
氛围: 古韵诗意,国风美学
style_constraint_en: IMPORTANT: Extract scenes from the story content. Use ancient Chinese scenes (old paths, peach groves, water towns). Do NOT use modern cities, sci-fi, or 'rainy ancient mansion'. Adapt to the story's actual setting in a hanfu context.
meta_prompt: Hanfu photography, traditional Chinese clothing, soft golden hour lighting, floral elements, elegant classical aesthetic, shallow depth of field

cognitive_level.reader_profile: 传统文化爱好者·审美古风
cognitive_level.content_adaptation: 入门级古风审美, 大众可直观欣赏

reader_constraint.reader_state: 古风爱好者·期待汉服之美
reader_constraint.reader_expectation: 汉服质感+古风场景+东方雅韵

visual_frequency.HF: 汉服纹样/人物面部/发饰细节(高频审美锚点)
visual_frequency.MF: 服饰整体/姿态构图/场景搭配(中频古风叙事)
visual_frequency.LF: 远景建筑/自然光影/氛围虚化(低频意境)
visual_frequency.progression: HF聚焦汉服细节之美, MF古风构图叙事, LF远景意境烘托
